method_summary: An unsupervised cross-spectral framework combining pseudo triplet loss with cross-spectral voting, a cross-spectral attention network leveraging multiple subspaces, and structured sparsity for discriminative cross-spectral clustering.
key_innovation: A novel unsupervised cross-spectral framework that achieves performance superior to completely supervised methods in some cases.
datasets_used: DEVCOM Army Research Laboratory Visible-Thermal Face Dataset (ARL-VTF)
title: Cross-Spectral Attention for Unsupervised RGB-IR Face Verification and Person Re-Identification
